title: Apply: Base Path
preconditions: Tester is familiar with testing guidelines document
testData:
Email: test.tester10001@test.com (increment number with every application)
Password: test123Test
steps:
1. Go to: https://dlccorp.wpenginepowered.com/
2. Click the 'Click to Apply Now!' button
3. Accept the default requested loan amount ($2,000)
4. Enter an email address (test.tester10001@test.com)
5. Create a password (test123Test)
6. Click the 'Create an account' button
7a. Fill out the Personal Information section of the form in accordance to guidelines
7b. Select the checkbox Mailing address matches above
8. Fill out the Income & Employment Info
9. Fill out the Authorizations & Signature
10. Select the checkbox I agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
11. Click on Fast Approval
12. Select the Bank from the Bank Account Verification
13. Search ValidiFi Bank
14. Enter User name = test_atrium and Password = password
15. Click on Continue, File uploading page is displayed.
expected: Application is successfully submitted and a decision is pending
actual: 'Whoops! Something went wrong. Please try again or call 866-550-4352 for assistance.' is showing.
notes:
https://razorvision.atlassian.net/browse/DLC-237
Daniel is going to review. This is a blocker for release.
We need to check that the Employment Information is sent to Infinity correctly.
11-06-2023: As per Andrew Tucker token authentication will work in production. So this will not affect the production.

title: Apply: Additional Income
testData:
Email: tester.xmcjh@example.com
Password: Tester@123Tester
First Name: Test
Last Name: Tester2
Birthday: 10/10/2000
SSN: 555757253
Cell Phone: 555-757-2530
Address: 8321 Cambria Dr.
City: Austin
State: Texas
Zip: 78717
steps:
1. Go to: https://dlccorp.wpenginepowered.com/
2. Click the 'Click to Apply Now!' button
3. Accept the default requested loan amount ($2,000)
4. Enter an email address
5. Create a password
6. Click the 'Create an account' button
7a. Fill out the Personal Information section of the form in accordance to guidelines
7b. Select the checkbox Mailing address matches above
8a. Fill out the Income & Employment Info
8b. Select the checkbox I have a secondary source of income
8c. Fill out the secondary Income info
9. Fill out the Authorizations & Signature
10. Upload State Issued ID, Proof of Income, Proof of Address
expected: Application is successfully submitted and a decision is pending

title: Apply: Add spouse (Wisconsin)
steps:
1. Go to: https://dlccorp.wpenginepowered.com/
2. Click the 'Click to Apply Now!' button
3. Accept the default requested loan amount ($2,000)
4. Enter an email address
5. Create a password
6. Click the 'Create an Account' button
7. Fill out the Personal Information section of the form in accordance to guidelines
   - Select the state as Wisconsin, Spouse info section appears at the bottom of the checkbox
   - Fill out the Spouse Info
8. Fill out the Income & Employment Info
9. Fill out the Authorizations & Signature
10. Upload State Issued ID, Proof of Income, Proof of Address
expected: Application is successfully submitted with spouse information and a decision is pending

title: Apply: Invalid Email
preconditions: Tester is familiar with testing guidelines document
testData:
First Name: Test
Last Name: Tester1
Birthday: 10/10/2000
SSN: 555-97-9479
Cell Phone: 555-979-4790
Email: test.tester1000@testcom (avoid TLD)
steps:
1. Go to: https://dlccorp.wpenginepowered.com/
2. Click the 'Click to Apply Now!' button
3. Accept the default requested loan amount ($2,000)
4. Enter an invalid email address (test.tester@examplecom) Avoid TLD
5. Create a password
6. Click the 'Create an account' button
7. Fill out the Personal Information section of the form
8. Fill out the Income & Employment Info
9. Fill out the Authorizations & Signature
expected: An error message should be displayed if an Invalid email is entered.
actual:
Users can enter an Invalid email. But the user won't be allowed to do a successful submission in this case. An error occurs at the time of submission. The following error message in this case:

Whoops! Something went wrong. Please try again or call 866-550-4352 for assistance.

Note: This error message is not user-friendly. User can't understand the reason for this error.
notes:
https://razorvision.atlassian.net/browse/DLC-232
Although this is a bug, it is not a regression. You can see the same behavior on their live site.

title: Member Area: Login
preconditions: There must be a customer already registered
testData: Registered customer email and password
steps:
1. Go to: https://dlccorp.wpenginepowered.com/
2. Click the 'Members Area' button at the top left of the page
3. Sign in page is displayed
4. Enter already registered customer email and password
5. Click on Sign In Button
expected: The user should be successfully navigated to the Members Area page.

title: MA: Sign In - Required fields
testData:
Case1: No input
Case2: Registered email only, no password
steps:
1. Go to: https://dlccorp.wpenginepowered.com/
2. Click the 'Members Area' button at the top left of the page
3. Sign in page is displayed
Case 1:
4. Click on Sign In Button
Case 2:
5. Enter a registered email
6. Click on Sign In Button
expected:
Case1: The following error message should be displayed: 'The username is a required field.'
Case2: The following error message should be displayed: 'The password is a required field.'

title: MA: Incorrect Username/Email or Password
testData: Registered customer email with wrong password
steps:
1. Go to: https://dlccorp.wpenginepowered.com/
2. Click the 'Members Area' button at the top left of the page
3. Sign in page is displayed
4. Enter already registered customer email
5. Enter a wrong password
6. Click on Sign In Button
expected: The following error message should be displayed: 'Incorrect username/email or password'

title: Member Area: Dashboard
preconditions: There must be a customer already registered with approved loan
testData: Registered customer credentials with approved loan
steps:
1. Go to: https://dlccorp.wpenginepowered.com/
2. Click the 'Members Area' button at the top left of the page
3. Sign in page is displayed
4. Enter already registered customer email and password
5. Click on Sign In Button
expected:
The user should be successfully navigated to the Members Area page - Dashboard by default.
The following 4 sections are displayed on the Dashboard:
- Credit
- Loan
- Payment
- Total

title: Forgot Password
steps:
1. Go to: https://dlccorp.wpenginepowered.com/
2. Click the 'Members Area' button at the top left of the page
3. Sign in page is displayed
4. Click on 'I forgot my password'
expected: User should be navigated to Reset Your Password page

title: Reset Password - Required fields
preconditions: Execute TC_4_001
steps:
1. Execute TC_4_001
2. Click on the Submit button from Reset your Password page
expected: The following error message should be displayed: 'The email address is a required field'

title: Reset Password
preconditions: Execute TC_4_001
testData: Email: fahejommova-5347@yopmail.com
steps:
1. Execute TC_4_001
2. Enter the email id of the customer
3. Click on the Submit button
expected:
The following message is displayed on the page with the 'Return to Login' link:
'We sent a confirmation email to you. Please check your inbox.'

title: Complete Reset Password
preconditions: Execute TC_4_003
testData: New Password and Confirm Password
steps:
1. Execute TC_4_003
2. Check the inbox of the entered email and click on the link given to reset the password
3. Enter the New Password and Confirm Password from the Complete Reset Password page
4. Click on the Submit button
expected:
The following message should be displayed with Go Login button:
'Your password has been updated successfully! Please try login again.'
While clicking on Go Login, it navigates to Sign In page

title: Login via newly reset password
preconditions: Execute TC_4_004
testData: Email and newly created password
steps:
1. Execute TC_4_004
2. Enter email and newly created password
3. Click on the Submit button
expected: User should be navigated to the Member Area page without any issues.

title: Change Password navigation
preconditions: Customer is logged into Member Area
testData: Registered customer email and password
steps:
1. Go to: https://dlccorp.wpenginepowered.com/
2. Click the 'Members Area' button at the top left of the page
3. Sign in page is displayed
4. Enter already registered customer email and password
5. Click on Sign In Button
6. Click on the Change Password link on the right side of the page
expected: The user should be navigated to the Change Password form

title: Change Password functionality
preconditions: Execute TC_4_006
testData: Current Password, New Password, New Password Confirmation
steps:
1. Execute TC_4_006
2. Enter Current Password, New Password, New Password Confirmation
3. Click on Update Password button
expected: The following message should be displayed: 'Your password has been updated.'

title: Change Password - Required fields
preconditions: Customer is logged into Member Area
testData:
Case1: No input
Case2: Current Password only
Case3: New Password only
Case4: New Password Confirmation only
steps:
1. Go to: https://dlccorp.wpenginepowered.com/
2. Click the 'Members Area' button at the top left of the page
3. Sign in page is displayed
4. Enter already registered customer email and password
5. Click on Sign In Button
6. Click on the Change Password link on the right side of the page
Case 1:
7. Click on the Update Password from Change Password page
Case 2:
8. Enter Current Password
9. Click on the Update Password from Change Password page
Case 3:
10. Enter New Password
11. Click on the Update Password from Change Password page
Case 4:
12. Enter New Password Confirmation
13. Click on the Update Password from Change Password page
expected:
Case1: The following error message should be displayed: 'The current password is a required field.'
Case2: The following error message should be displayed: 'The new password is a required field.'
Case3: The following error message should be displayed: 'The confirmation is a required field.'
Case4: The following message should be displayed: 'Your password has been updated.'

title: Make Payment - Loan Payment
preconditions: Customer is logged into Member Area with an active loan
testData: Registered customer credentials with active loan
steps:
1. Go to: https://dlccorp.wpenginepowered.com/
2. Click the 'Members Area' button at the top left of the page
3. Sign in page is displayed
4. Enter already registered customer email and password
5. Click on Sign In Button
6. Click on the Make Payment button on the Payment section
expected:
Make Payment page is displayed with following details:

Heading: Make Payment
Subheading: Loan Payment
Text: By Electing To use this online portal for payment, you are agreeing to pay a convenience fee of $0.00 to Repay, a third-party payment processor.

[Go Back] button [Continue] button

title: Make Payment - Payment Details
preconditions: Customer is logged into Member Area with an active loan
testData: Registered customer credentials with active loan
steps:
1. Go to: https://dlccorp.wpenginepowered.com/
2. Click the 'Members Area' button at the top left of the page
3. Sign in page is displayed
4. Enter already registered customer email and password
5. Click on Sign In Button
6. Click on the Make Payment button on the Payment section
7. Click on the Continue button on the Loan Payment page
expected:
Make Payment page displays Payment Details with:
- Minimum Payment Amount
- Current Principal Due
- Current Interest Due
- New Due Date
- Payment Amount radio buttons (Total Amount Due, Payoff Amount, Custom Amount)
- Payment Type with Debit Card option (disabled by default)
- [Go back] button

title: Make a Payment by selecting Total Amount Due
preconditions: Customer is logged into Member Area with an active loan
testData: Registered customer credentials with active loan
steps:
1. Go to: https://dlccorp.wpenginepowered.com/
2. Click the 'Members Area' button at the top left of the page
3. Sign in page is displayed
4. Enter already registered customer email and password
5. Click on Sign In Button
6. Click on the Make Payment button on the Payment section
7. Click on the Continue button on the Loan Payment page
8. Select the radio button 'Total Amount Due (as of today)' for the Payment amount
9. Select 'Debit Card' as Payment Type
expected:
- Once after selecting any Payment amount, the Payment Type should be enabled.
- If we select Payment Type is Debit Card, the debit card details form is displayed for filling
actual: Nothing will happen after selecting Debit Card

6. Click on the 'New Loan' button on the Credit section

8. Click on 'Submit Application' from the last form
expected: User can able to re-apply a new loan successfully.
